metadata.significance: Describes the Day of Resurrection and proves life after death

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِيَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ

translations.en_sahih: I swear by the Day of Resurrection
translations.en_yusufali: I do call to witness the Resurrection Day;
translations.ms_basmeih: Aku bersumpah dengan Hari Kiamat;

translations.en_sahih: And I swear by the reproaching soul [to the certainty of resurrection].
translations.en_yusufali: And I do call to witness the self-reproaching spirit: (Eschew Evil).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Aku bersumpah dengan "Nafsul Lawwaamah" (Bahawa kamu akan dibangkitkan sesudah mati)!

translations.en_sahih: Does man think that We will not assemble his bones?
translations.en_yusufali: Does man think that We cannot assemble his bones?
translations.ms_basmeih: Patutkah manusia (yang kafir) menyangka bahawa Kami tidak akan dapat mengumpulkan tulang-tulangnya (dan menghidupkannya semula)?

ayahs.arabic: بَلَىٰ قَـٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ
ayahs.transliteration: Bala qadireena AAala an nusawwiya bananahu

translations.en_sahih: Yes. [We are] Able [even] to proportion his fingertips.
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, We are able to put together in perfect order the very tips of his fingers.
translations.ms_basmeih: Bukan sebagaimana yang disangka itu, bahkan Kami berkuasa menyusun (dengan sempurnanya segala tulang) jarinya, (tulang yang lebih halus dari yang lain).

translations.en_sahih: But man desires to continue in sin.
translations.en_yusufali: But man wishes to do wrong (even) in the time in front of him.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kebenaran itu bukan tidak ada buktinya), bahkan manusia (yang ingkar) sentiasa suka hendak meneruskan perbuatan kufur dan maksiat (di sepanjang hayatnya, sehingga ia tidak mengakui adanya hari kiamat).

translations.en_sahih: He asks, "When is the Day of Resurrection?"
translations.en_yusufali: He questions: "When is the Day of Resurrection?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dia bertanya (secara mengejek): "Bilakah datangnya hari kiamat itu?"

translations.en_sahih: So when vision is dazzled
translations.en_yusufali: At length, when the sight is dazed,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (jawabnya: hari kiamat akan datang) apabila pemandangan menjadi terpendar-pendar (kerana gerun takut),

translations.en_sahih: And the moon darkens
translations.en_yusufali: And the moon is buried in darkness.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bulan hilang cahayanya,

translations.en_sahih: And the sun and the moon are joined,
translations.en_yusufali: And the sun and moon are joined together,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan matahari serta bulan dihimpunkan bersama,

translations.en_sahih: Man will say on that Day, "Where is the [place of] escape?"
translations.en_yusufali: That Day will Man say: "Where is the refuge?"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Maka) pada hari itu, berkatalah manusia (yang ingkarkan hari kiamat): "Ke manakah hendak melarikan diri?"

translations.en_sahih: No! There is no refuge.
translations.en_yusufali: By no means! No place of safety!
translations.ms_basmeih: Tak usahlah bertanya demikian! Tidak ada lagi tempat perlindungan!

translations.en_sahih: To your Lord, that Day, is the [place of] permanence.
translations.en_yusufali: Before thy Lord (alone), that Day will be the place of rest.
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari itu, kepada Tuhanmu lah sahaja terserahnya ketetapan segala perkara.

ayahs.arabic: يُنَبَّؤُا۟ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yunabbao alinsanu yawmaithin bima qaddama waakhkhara

translations.en_sahih: Man will be informed that Day of what he sent ahead and kept back.
translations.en_yusufali: That Day will Man be told (all) that he put forward, and all that he put back.
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari itu, manusia diberitahu akan apa yang ia telah lakukan, dan apa yang ia telah tinggalkan.

translations.en_sahih: Rather, man, against himself, will be a witness,
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, man will be evidence against himself,
translations.ms_basmeih: Bahkan manusia itu, (anggotanya) menjadi saksi terhadap dirinya sendiri,

translations.en_sahih: Even if he presents his excuses.
translations.en_yusufali: Even though he were to put up his excuses.
translations.ms_basmeih: Walaupun ia memberikan alasan-alasannya (untuk membela diri).

ayahs.arabic: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِۦٓ
ayahs.transliteration: La tuharrik bihi lisanaka litaAAjala bihi

translations.en_sahih: Move not your tongue with it, [O Muhammad], to hasten with recitation of the Qur'an.
translations.en_yusufali: Move not thy tongue concerning the (Qur'an) to make haste therewith.
translations.ms_basmeih: Janganlah engkau (wahai Muhammad) - Kerana hendakkan cepat menghafaz Quran yang diturunkan kepadamu - menggerakkan lidahmu membacanya (sebelum selesai dibacakan kepadamu).

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, upon Us is its collection [in your heart] and [to make possible] its recitation.
translations.en_yusufali: It is for Us to collect it and to promulgate it:
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kamilah yang berkuasa mengumpulkan Al-Quran itu (dalam dadamu), dan menetapkan bacaannya (pada lidahmu);

translations.en_sahih: So when We have recited it [through Gabriel], then follow its recitation.
translations.en_yusufali: But when We have promulgated it, follow thou its recital (as promulgated):
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, apabila Kami telah menyempurnakan bacaannya (kepadamu, dengan perantaraan Jibril), maka bacalah menurut bacaannya itu;

translations.en_sahih: Then upon Us is its clarification [to you].
translations.en_yusufali: Nay more, it is for Us to explain it (and make it clear):
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian, sesungguhnya kepada Kamilah terserah urusan menjelaskan kandungannya (yang memerlukan penjelasan).

translations.en_sahih: No! But you love the immediate
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, (ye men!) but ye love the fleeting life,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedarlah wahai orang-orang yang lalai. (Sebenarnya kamu tidak ingatkan kesudahan kamu) bahkan kamu sentiasa mencintai (Kesenangan dan kemewahan dunia) yang cepat habisnya.

translations.en_sahih: And leave the Hereafter.
translations.en_yusufali: And leave alone the Hereafter.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kamu tidak menghiraukan (bekalan untuk) hari akhirat (yang kekal abadi kehidupannya).

translations.en_sahih: [Some] faces, that Day, will be radiant,
translations.en_yusufali: Some faces, that Day, will beam (in brightness and beauty);-
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari akhirat itu, muka (orang-orang yang beriman) berseri-seri;

translations.en_sahih: Looking at their Lord.
translations.en_yusufali: Looking towards their Lord;
translations.ms_basmeih: Melihat kepada Tuhannya.

translations.en_sahih: And [some] faces, that Day, will be contorted,
translations.en_yusufali: And some faces, that Day, will be sad and dismal,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan pada hari itu, muka (orang-orang kafir) muram hodoh,

translations.en_sahih: Expecting that there will be done to them [something] backbreaking.
translations.en_yusufali: In the thought that some back-breaking calamity was about to be inflicted on them;
translations.ms_basmeih: Sambil percaya dengan yakin bahawa mereka akan ditimpa malapetaka (azab seksa) yang membinasakan.

translations.en_sahih: No! When the soul has reached the collar bones
translations.en_yusufali: Yea, when (the soul) reaches to the collar-bone (in its exit),
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedarlah (janganlah mengutamakan dunia dan melupakan akhirat. Ingatlah akan hal orang yang hendak mati) apabila rohnya sampai ke pangkal kerongkong,

translations.en_sahih: And it is said, "Who will cure [him]?"
translations.en_yusufali: And there will be a cry, "Who is a magician (to restore him)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (orang-orang yang hadir di sisinya heboh) berkata: "Siapakah yang dapat menawar jampi (dan mengubatnya)?"

translations.en_sahih: And the dying one is certain that it is the [time of] separation
translations.en_yusufali: And he will conclude that it was (the Time) of Parting;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan ia sendiri yakin, bahawa sesungguhnya saat itu saat perpisahan;

translations.en_sahih: And the leg is wound about the leg,
translations.en_yusufali: And one leg will be joined with another:
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta kedahsyatan bertindih-tindih;

translations.en_sahih: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession.
translations.en_yusufali: That Day the Drive will be (all) to thy Lord!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Maka) kepada Tuhanmu lah - pada waktu itu - engkau dibawa (untuk menerima balasan).

translations.en_sahih: And the disbeliever had not believed, nor had he prayed.
translations.en_yusufali: So he gave nothing in charity, nor did he pray!-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Oleh sebab orang yang kufur ingkar tidak percayakan hari akhirat) maka ia tidak mengakui kebenaran (yang diwajibkan meyakininya) dan ia tidak mengerjakan sembahyang (yang difardhukan mengerjakannya)!

translations.en_sahih: But [instead], he denied and turned away.
translations.en_yusufali: But on the contrary, he rejected Truth and turned away!
translations.ms_basmeih: Akan tetapi ia mendustakan, dan berpaling ingkar!

translations.en_sahih: And then he went to his people, swaggering [in pride].
translations.en_yusufali: Then did he stalk to his family in full conceit!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian ia pergi kepada keluarganya dengan berlagak sombong megah.

translations.en_sahih: Woe to you, and woe!
translations.en_yusufali: Woe to thee, (O men!), yea, woe!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Wahai orang yang kufur ingkar!) sudahlah dekat kepadamu kebinasaanmu, sudahlah dekat!

translations.en_sahih: Then woe to you, and woe!
translations.en_yusufali: Again, Woe to thee, (O men!), yea, woe!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian api nerakalah lebih layak bagimu, lebih layak.

translations.en_sahih: Does man think that he will be left neglected?
translations.en_yusufali: Does man think that he will be left uncontrolled, (without purpose)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Patutkah manusia menyangka, bahawa ia akan ditinggalkan terbiar (dengan tidak diberikan tanggungjawab dan tidak dihidupkan menerima balasan)?

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ يَكُ نُطْفَةً مِّن مَّنِىٍّ يُمْنَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam yaku nutfatan min manayyin yumna

translations.en_sahih: Had he not been a sperm from semen emitted?
translations.en_yusufali: Was he not a drop of sperm emitted (in lowly form)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Bukankah ia berasal dari air mani yang dipancarkan (ke dalam rahim)?

translations.en_sahih: Then he was a clinging clot, and [Allah] created [his form] and proportioned [him]
translations.en_yusufali: Then did he become a leech-like clot; then did (Allah) make and fashion (him) in due proportion.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian air mani itu menjadi sebuku darah beku, sesudah itu Tuhan menciptakannya, dan menyempurnakan kejadiannya (sebagai manusia)?

translations.en_sahih: And made of him two mates, the male and the female.
translations.en_yusufali: And of him He made two sexes, male and female.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu Tuhan menjadikan daripadanya dua jenis - lelaki dan perempuan.

ayahs.arabic: أَلَيْسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْـِۧىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Alaysa thalika biqadirin AAala an yuhyiya almawta

translations.en_sahih: Is not that [Creator] Able to give life to the dead?
translations.en_yusufali: Has not He, (the same), the power to give life to the dead?
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah (Tuhan yang menjadikan semuanya) itu - tidak berkuasa menghidupkan orang-orang yang mati? (Tentulah berkuasa)!
